description_long: This airplane features a compact, futuristic design with a predominantly blue and orange color scheme accented by white and gray details. The wings are sharply swept back and display distinctive insignias and geometric patterns, while the fuselage is streamlined with a pointed nose and a canopy situated at the front. Twin jet engines are mounted on either side of the fuselage, integrated into the wing roots, and are detailed with visible exhausts and mechanical components. The tail section is minimal, with no prominent vertical stabilizer, giving the aircraft a sleek, almost delta-like profile. The landing gear appears robust and is positioned beneath the engines, suggesting a tricycle configuration. The overall appearance is that of a high-performance, possibly military or sci-fi inspired aircraft, designed for agility and speed in urban or futuristic environments.
description: A compact, futuristic blue and orange airplane with swept wings, twin jet engines, and a streamlined, pointed nose. The design features bold insignias, a front canopy, and robust landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward canopy, and symmetrical twin jet engines integrated into the wing roots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swept-back wing, visible engine details, and the robust landing gear beneath the engine.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin engine exhausts, minimal tail section, and the full wingspan with insignias on each wingtip.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing engine details, landing gear, and the angular wing design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; wings feature bold insignias and geometric patterns.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the wing roots, integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail section with no prominent vertical stabilizer, resembling a tailless or blended wing design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units beneath the engines and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy at the front of the fuselage.
